chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-2289 of 2008 _____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.24301/2017 2. For orders on CMA No.24302/2017 30.08.2017:- Mr. Imtiaz Mansoor Solangi, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Butt, D.A.G. Mr. Usman Tufail Shaikh, Advocate for P.I.A. ________________ 1. Urgency application is allowed. 2. Perusal of record reveals that earlier the petitioners filed a contempt application bearing No.37467/2015 that was disposed of on the basis of the statement filed by the learned counsel for the respondents No.2 and 3 wherein it was stated that after 2010 PIA has not appointed any person as Baggage Attendant/loader and copy of that statement was provided to learned counsel for the petitioners, who after going through the same is satisfied with regard to the compliance of the order of this Court. Again, the petitioners filed the instant contempt application. We have heard the learned counsel and come to the conclusion that no case for commission of contempt is made out. Therefore, the contempt application is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Nasir/-
